instruction: Register the complaint information in the spreadsheet

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

printf 'Complaint ID: CP-20250315-001
Client: Beijing StarTech Co., Ltd.
Complaint Time: 2025-03-15 10:23
Complaint Type: Product Quality
Description: Batch B2025003 products have widespread defects
Severity: High
Handler: Quality Dept, Wang Lin
Expected Resolution: 2025-03-20' > /home/user/Desktop/customer_complaint.txt

python3 -c "import openpyxl; wb = openpyxl.Workbook(); ws = wb.active; ws['A1'] = 'Complaint ID'; ws['B1'] = 'Client'; ws['C1'] = 'Complaint Type'; ws['D1'] = 'Severity'; ws['E1'] = 'Handler'; ws['F1'] = 'Expected Resolution'; wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/complaint_log.xlsx')"

phases.instruction: Register the complaint information in the spreadsheet

Fill the complaint information from /home/user/Desktop/customer_complaint.txt into /home/user/Desktop/complaint_log.xlsx row 2: A2='CP-20250315-001', B2='Beijing StarTech Co., Ltd.', C2='Product Quality', D2='High', E2='Wang Lin', F2='2025-03-20', save

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/complaint_log.xlsx'); s = df.to_string(); print('PASSED' if 'CP-20250315-001' in s else 'FAILED')"
